title: Ocean Overhaul
description: This modpack completely overhauls Minecrafts ocean, adding much more for you to explore and performance improvements.
body:
#
Ocean Overhaul
![Image from mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f84093354cd58d820b83cb113523f931206b0499_0.webp) ### More to explore This modpack focuses on making Minecrafts ocean full of new content! There are deeper oceans, you can make your own ships, you can find new fish, and the list goes on. ### Play multiplayer with friends You can also quickly and easily play multiplayer with friends for free without having to rely on a server hosting website or having to forward any ports. There is also proximity chat so you can talk to your friends without having to call and to make the game more immersive. ### Smooth gameplay There are many mods that improve the framerate of your game and give you a similar experience to Optifine so you dont have to buy a new computer or make your game look bad.
External Website Mods It is reccomended to get Physics Mod Pro 1.20.1 from Patreon. (Mod is free).

Mods below are included in the modpack.

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nocubes-sea-dwellers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nocubes-sea-dwellers) [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture-delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture-delight)
